user.description: If you need help with the configuration have a look here: https://github.com/ApolloAutomation/zone-mapper

reconfigure.description: Update the credentials for this integration.

error.connection: Unable to connect to the server.

data.auto_create_view: Auto-create a Zone Mapper view on first setup

data_description.auto_create_view: Appends a 'Zone Mapper' view with the card to your default dashboard the first time this integration is set up. Turn off before adding the integration to skip this. Once the view is created (or skipped), it won't be re-added.

update_failed.message: Failed to update data from the server.

switch_turn_on_failed.message: Failed to turn on the switch.

switch_turn_off_failed.message: Failed to turn off the switch.
